g.text: Project Q, K, V into h subspaces
Independent learned linear projections W_iᴽ, W_iᴷ, W_iⱽ — one
set per head; each head sees a different view of the inputs.
Run scaled DPA in each head in parallel
d_k = d_v = d_model / h = 64. Total compute stays comparable
Concatenated head outputs go through a final linear map back
Each head can attend to different representation subspaces at different positions.
Source: Vaswani et al. 2017, §3.2.2 Multi-Head Attention
